calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Continued To Feb-07-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christine Marcelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, litigation specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Peter W. Chan.
Default was entered against defendant on June 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Peter W. Chan as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,099.44.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,994.44.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $428.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $53,521.88.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
